rdf:Description.dc:publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft Harrassowitz Verlag Harrassowitz Verlag,

oa:Annotation.lawd:hasName: Fǝqura ʾIyasus of Dangʷalo (according to ), or of Qǝfrǝyā “one of the districts of Dangalo” (according to ).

rdf:Description.dcterms:hasPart: How the Holy Virgin saves Jesus hiding him in the trunk of a sycamore at Dabra Mǝṭmāq

crm:E52_Time-span.crm:P78_is_identified_by: Second half of the sixteenth-/first half of the seventeenth-century

rdf:Description.dcterms:hasPart: Works dedicated to John the Baptist
